subject: [PATCH 13/19] nfsd: fix clock domain mismatch in clients_still_reclaiming()

2026-06-09.patch_summary: This patch fixes a bug in the NFS server where clients can hold the server in grace indefinitely by sending CLAIM_PREVIOUS OPEN requests, blocking all non-reclaim operations for other clients. The issue arises from a clock domain mismatch between CLOCK_REALTIME and CLOCK_BOOTTIME used in the deadline computation of the clients_still_reclaiming() function. To fix this, the patch adds a new boot_time_bt field to store the boot time in CLOCK_BOOTTIME and uses it alongside the existing boot_time for the deadline computation.
